response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack engineer and software craftsman with strong leadership and mentoring skills. However, he fundamentally misses the core minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming, possessing only about six months of professional C++ experience. Furthermore, his background leans heavily toward web applications, Node.js, and TypeScript, rather than the deep, low-level cloud compute platform and hardware architecture expertise required for this role.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) with a strong focus on software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD.
Proven technical leadership and mentoring abilities, evidenced by organizing workshops, teaching courses, and holding Staff-level positions.
Demonstrated ability to own and architect end-to-end systems, including founding an open-source Geo-Data platform deployed on Kubernetes.
concerns: Critically falls short of the minimum 8 years of C++ programming requirement, with only about 6 months of professional C++ experience listed.
Cloud infrastructure experience is primarily application-level (AWS CDK, web deployments) rather than foundational cloud compute platform engineering.
Core technical stack heavily skews towards full-stack web technologies (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang) rather than low-level distributed systems.
